items.title: ‘It’s like a psychological ceiling’: Why fast-food chains are trying to stay below $10 in their pricing
items.description: Consumers don’t consider it a bargain if you cross into double-digit territory, experts say.

items.title: ThinkCareBelieve:  Week 31 of Trump Leading America’s Clean Up
items.author: Thinkcarebelieve
items.description: President Trump's administration highlights progress in DC clean-up, international diplomacy, economic recovery, and national security, with efforts focused on election integrity, child trafficking prevention, and economic revitalization.
